title: Meta-RL Full Paper Sweep
adapter_boundary: Meta-RL outputs only bounded delta_P_eng_on and delta_SOC_ref; map/rule EMS keeps engine-state and power-split authority.
claim: production-like EMS task-aware calibration adapter improves SOC regulation and constraint robustness under unseen driving conditions
verdict: Completed and stable; improvements are positive on heldout averages but too small for the current strong paper success thresholds.

metadata.oracle_definition: bounded-offset DP action-bound sweep; DP chooses only delta_P_eng_on and delta_SOC_ref while map/rule EMS keeps engine-state and power-split authority
metadata.full_power_split_dp_note: Full power-split DP is included only as an offline diagnostic reference and is not inverted into calibration bounds.

full_power_split_dp.definition: discretized offline full power-split DP oracle that directly chooses engine power; not deployable and not the same authority as the Meta-RL adapter

metadata.paper_sentence: The action bounds were selected through a bounded-offset DP sweep under the same calibration-adapter authority, using full power-split DP only as an offline diagnostic reference.

selection_rule: Primary: heldout SOC_RMSE and abs_final_SOC_error improvement.
Constraint steps must not worsen versus both baseline and current +/-3 kW / +/-0.01 SOC bound.
Recommended bound is the smallest-authority Pareto/elbow candidate within 95% of the best feasible primary score.
Aggressive bound is the best feasible primary-score candidate.
selection.paper_sentence: The action bounds were selected through a bounded-offset DP sweep under the same calibration-adapter authority, using full power-split DP only as an offline diagnostic reference.

rule: minimize SOC_RMSE, abs_final_SOC_error, then maximize reward

controllers.selection_note: zero-offset map/rule EMS; no learned policy or training reward
seed_20260710: selected final policy by heldout physical deltas
seed_20260707: selected final policy by heldout physical deltas

trajectory_comparison.reward_comparison_warning: old/new reward formula의 episode_reward 절대값은 직접 비교하지 않는다.
trajectory_comparison.physical_metric_statement: 비교는 동일 rollout 조건에서 계산한 reward-independent physical metrics를 중심으로 수행한다.
trajectory_comparison.baseline_statement: baseline은 학습된 정책이 아니라 zero-offset map/rule EMS이다.
trajectory_comparison.label_refresh_note: Profile fingerprints are retained in profile_fingerprint; report and plots use human-readable case/profile labels.
